title: helicia obovatifolia var. obovatifolia
intro: Helicia obovatifolia var. obovatifolia is a species of plant in the family Proteaceae, native to the tropical rainforests of the Philippines. It is a small to medium-sized tree with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering health benefits such as reduced pain and improved immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used as a poultice to relieve pain and inflammation, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
